==Pokémon==
This listing is of Barry's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}:
{{TrainerPoké
|main=yes
|trainer=Barry
|pkmn=Empoleon
|type1=Water
|type2=Steel
|img=Barry Empoleon.png
|hd=yes
|epnum=DP101
|epname=Barry's Busting Out All Over!
|vajp=Katsuyuki Konishi
|vaen=Bill Rogers
|desc={{p|Empoleon}} is Barry's main Pokémon. Empoleon was first seen in ''[[DP101|Barry's Busting Out All Over!]]'' in a battle against Ash's Pikachu, which it lost.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Barry
|pkmn=Staraptor
|type1=Normal
|type2=Flying
|img=Barry Staraptor.png
|epnum=DP101
|epname=Barry's Busting Out All Over!
|vajp=Shin-ichiro Miki
|vaen=Sarah Natochenny
|desc={{p|Staraptor}} was the first Pokémon to be used in the battle against {{Ash}}. It went up against his {{AP|Chimchar}} and was knocked out with a combination of {{m|Dig}} and {{m|Flamethrower}}.

Staraptor appeared again in ''[[DP110|Steeling Peace of Mind!]]'' where it took on [[Team Galactic]], only for it to get hit by {{p|Golbat}}'s {{m|Sludge Bomb}}.

Staraptor's known moves are {{m|Tackle}}, {{m|Close Combat}}, and {{m|Wing Attack}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Barry
|pkmn=Roserade
|type1=Grass
|type2=Poison
|img=Barry Roserade.png
|epnum=DP101
|epname=Barry's Busting Out All Over!
|vajp=Ikue Otani
|vaen=Sarah Natochenny
|desc={{p|Roserade}} was the second Pokémon Barry used after {{p|Staraptor}} got knocked out in [[DP101|his first battle against Ash]]. It managed to defeat {{AP|Chimchar}} with a barrage of {{m|Poison Jab}}s as Chimchar was worn out from the battle with Staraptor. Roserade's next opponent was {{AP|Gliscor}}, it traded Poison Jabs with Gliscor's {{m|X-Scissor}}s, only for both of them to get defeated at the same time.

Roserade appeared again in ''[[DP110|Steeling Peace of Mind!]]'' where it battled [[Team Galactic]], only for it to be hit by {{p|Golbat}}'s {{m|Air Cutter}}.

Roserade's only known move is {{m|Poison Jab}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Barry
|pkmn=Heracross
|type1=Bug
|type2=Fighting
|gender=male
|img=Barry Heracross.png
|hd=yes
|epnum=DP110
|epname=Steeling Peace of Mind!
|vajp=Katsuyuki Konishi
|vaen=Katsuyuki Konishi
|desc={{p|Heracross}} first appeared in ''[[DP110|Steeling Peace of Mind!]]'' on [[Iron Island]] alongside his {{pkmn|Trainer}}. He was training with {{TP|Barry|Empoleon}}, but the training got interrupted when Empoleon started attacking them as it was controlled by the sound waves coming from within the island. Later, he took Barry on a flight around Iron Island to see the cause of the {{type|Steel}} going haywire, including his Empoleon. Heracross was then hit by a Skarmory's {{m|Steel Wing}}, sending them falling onto Team Rocket. Heracross attacked Team Rocket as they were accused to be the ones behind all of this. However, after pointing out the machines located on the island, it turned out that another [[Team Galactic|villainous team]] was the cause. The Galactic's {{p|Golbat}} attacked them with {{m|Air Cutter}} and severely damaged Heracross.

Heracross reappeared in ''[[DP140|Historical Mystery Tour!]]'' battling [[Ash's Pikachu]]. Heracross was able to withstand Pikachu's attacks and became stronger from the last time. The battle got interrupted when a {{p|Xatu}} flew by. Xatu lead the group to a tent owned by a {{tc|Clown}} and they got sent to another world. When they woke up, they got separated and searched for their Pokémon. While Barry was looking for his Heracross, he found a tree. He had a flashback about the time he caught Heracross after slathering [[honey]] on a tree. He did the same thing this time and Heracross came up to Barry and the tree.

Heracross's known moves are {{m|Megahorn}}, {{m|Fury Attack}}, {{m|Horn Attack}}, and {{m|Double-Edge}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Barry
|pkmn=Skarmory
|type1=Steel
|type2=Flying
|img=Barry Skarmory.png
|hd=yes
|epnum=DP184
|epname=Casting a Paul on Barry!
|vajp=Katsuyuki Konishi
|vaen=Tom Wayland
|desc={{p|Skarmory}} was the first Pokémon used at the [[Lily of the Valley Conference]] in his match against [[Paul]], going up against his {{TP|Paul|Magmortar}}. As its first move, Skarmory used {{m|Spikes}} on the field to damage Paul's Pokémon whenever they were sent out. Afterward, it was easily knocked out by {{p|Magmortar}}'s {{m|Flamethrower}}.

Skarmory's only known move is {{m|Spikes}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Barry
|pkmn=Hitmonlee
|type1=Fighting
|img=Barry Hitmonlee.png
|gender=male
|hd=yes
|epnum=DP184
|epname=Casting a Paul on Barry!
|vajp=Yūji Ueda
|vaen=Tom Wayland
|desc={{p|Hitmonlee}} was the third Pokémon Barry used at the [[Lily of the Valley Conference]] in his match against [[Paul]] after [[recall]]ing {{TP|Barry|Empoleon}}, battling against {{TP|Paul|Ursaring}}. Both gave a good fight, whereas Hitmonlee showed good speed, agility, and strength. {{p|Ursaring}} managed to evade some attacks, but when it was hit by Hitmonlee's {{m|Blaze Kick}}, it was {{status|burn}}ed, and this activated its {{a|Guts}} [[Ability]], which greatly increased Ursaring's attack power, allowing it to defeat Hitmonlee with a powerful {{m|Hammer Arm}}.

Hitmonlee's known moves are {{m|Mega Kick}}, {{m|Close Combat}}, {{m|High Jump Kick}}, and {{m|Blaze Kick}}.}}
